name: Jira
description: Imports security issues from Atlassian Jira (Cloud or Server/Data Center) into XORCISM as findings. Each Jira issue becomes a VULNERABILITY (CVE referenced in summary/description if present, else JIRA-<key>; severity mapped from the issue priority); the affected asset is resolved from the issue's component, an asset-like label, or the `asset`/`project` fallback. Live mode queries the Jira REST API (`/rest/api/3/search` with JQL, paginated); offline mode parses a saved Jira search-results JSON. Secrets via worker env only: JIRA_URL (base), JIRA_USER (email, Cloud) + JIRA_TOKEN (API token / PAT). No DB access in run.py (worker-safe).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to a Jira search-results JSON export to import (offline mode).

parameters.name: project
parameters.help: Live mode: Jira project key to import (builds JQL `project = KEY AND statusCategory != Done`).

parameters.name: jql
parameters.help: Live mode: explicit JQL overriding `project` (e.g. `labels in (security, vulnerability) AND statusCategory != Done`).

parameters.name: max
parameters.help: Live mode: maximum issues to import (paginated).

parameters.name: asset
parameters.help: Fallback asset name when an issue has no component/asset label (default: the project key).
